markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review Blaxel's proposed content strategy and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Approved:** The strategy targets buyer-level content for VPs/CTOs to build trust and visibility, addressing Blaxel's core challenge of low market awareness.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [**Strategic Focus:** Content will own the "production reliability for AI agents" niche, differentiating Blaxel's micro-VMs from competitors' less secure containers and highlighting its 25ms cold-start solution.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1999.0)
  - [**Content Clusters Defined:** Six strategic clusters were approved, with key feedback to broaden the "AI agents" cluster beyond frameworks to include generic SDKs (e.g., Next.js) and to monitor the long-term viability of the "MCP" cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
  - [**Access Granted:** GrowthX now has "Full" access to Google Search Console and PostHog, enabling performance tracking. A CMS walkthrough is the final prerequisite for publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2482.0)

## Topics

### The Challenge: Visibility, Not Product

  - [**Core Problem:** Excellent tech lacks market visibility. Competitors with inferior products dominate search due to earlier market entry.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [**Strategic Goal:** Build long-term trust and awareness.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
      - [**Trust (Long-term):** Essential for high-stakes production infrastructure decisions.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
      - [**Awareness (Mid-term):** Measurable impact expected in 1–2 years.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [**Target Audience:** VPs of Engineering and CTOs at Series B to IPO tech companies.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [**Blaxel's Bottleneck:** A 9-person team with no marketing staff.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
      - [**GrowthX's Role:** Create buyer-focused content (educational, decision-making) for VPs/CTOs, complementing the technical blog written by Blaxel's technical writer.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)

### Competitor Analysis & Strategic Gap

  - [**Daytona:** High-volume, low-intent content (e.g., glossaries) → attracts beginners, not decision-makers.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [**Modal:** High technical authority (e.g., flash attention articles) → attracts both practitioners and buyers.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [**The Gap (Blaxel's Territory):** No one owns the "production reliability for AI agents" niche.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)
      - [**Blaxel's Differentiators:**](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
          - [**Micro-VMs:** Superior isolation to competitors' containers.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
          - [**25ms Cold Starts:** Solves the 2–5 second latency of traditional serverless.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2019.0)
          - [**SOC2 & HIPAA:** Critical for enterprise trust.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2227.0)

### Proposed Content Clusters & Feedback

  - [**1. AI Agents & Agent Development:**](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
      - [**Goal:** Position Blaxel within the broader agentic movement.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Broaden focus beyond frameworks (LangChain, CrewAI) to include generic SDKs (Next.js, Vercel AI SDK).](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [**2. Agent Use Cases & Applications:**](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
      - [**Goal:** Capture developers searching for specific implementations (coding agents, PR review).](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [**3. Code Execution & Sandboxes:**](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)
      - [**Goal:** Educate on core product value.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)
      - [**Key Topic:** Micro-VMs vs. containers → directly supports competitive positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [**4. MCP Foundations:**](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)
      - [**Goal:** Own the educational conversation in a high-growth category.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Monitor the category's long-term viability, as its future is uncertain.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)
  - [**5. Serverless Computing & Cloud Infrastructure:**](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1999.0)
      - [**Goal:** Frame the serverless cold-start problem and position Blaxel's 25ms solution.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2019.0)
      - [**Future Idea:** Explore content on "serverless for AI" as a new category.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2098.0)
  - [**6. Comparisons & Alternatives:**](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2162.0)
      - [**Goal:** Capture developers actively evaluating solutions (e.g., "EB2 alternatives").](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2162.0)
  - [**7. Security & Compliance:**](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2227.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build trust with decision-makers (VPs/CTOs).](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2227.0)
      - [**Key Topics:** Tenant isolation, SOC2, HIPAA → leverage Blaxel's core advantages.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2227.0)

### Next Steps & Logistics

  - [**GrowthX Deliverables:**](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
      - [**Calibration Article:** One article for voice/tone feedback, due before the Jan 2 meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2342.0)
      - [**Content Calendar:** Airtable base with 40–50 topic ideas for review.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2358.0)
      - [**Image Generation:** AI-generated featured image examples based on Blaxel's homepage.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2383.0)
      - [**Looker Dashboard:** Real-time performance tracking (traffic, LLM referrals).](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2482.0)
  - [**Access & Permissions:**](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2482.0)
      - [**Google Search Console (GSC):** GrowthX granted "Full" access.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2594.0)
      - [**PostHog:** GrowthX granted access via a new invite link.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2834.0)
      - [**GA4:** Not used by Blaxel.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2517.0)
  - [**CMS Walkthrough:**](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2896.0)
      - [**Action:** Paul to coordinate a session with Nico and Thomas to demonstrate the Strapi CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2896.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Enable GrowthX's publishing team. A Loom video is an acceptable alternative.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2896.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Paul:**](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
      - [Review and comment on the four foundational Notion documents.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
      - [Coordinate a CMS walkthrough with Nico and Thomas (Loom video is an option).](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2896.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
      - [Deliver the calibration article and content calendar for review by the Jan 2 meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2304.0)
      - [Provide AI-generated featured image examples.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2383.0)
      - [Set up the Looker dashboard using GSC and PostHog data.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=2482.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=3149.0)
      - [Next sync: **Jan 2, 2026**.](https://fathom.video/share/zxNyxr2nUitsFLrKE2aRZGbxUqThZGdR?tab=summary&timestamp=3149.0)
